description: A wide-angle photograph captures a glaciated alpine landscape under a partly cloudy sky. In the midground and background, a large glacier dominates the scene, displaying a heavily fractured and textured surface of white and grey ice with prominent crevasses. Dark, rugged mountain peaks, some with residual snow patches, rise above the glacier on both sides and recede into the distance, partially veiled by white and grey clouds. The immediate foreground features dark brown and grey rocky terrain and scree. Patches of blue sky are visible between the clouds.
